description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a distinctive angular frame and a camouflage pattern across its body. The weapon is equipped with a skeletonized stock, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section, and a detachable box magazine located in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is extended and fitted with a suppressor, enhancing its stealth capabilities for urban operations. A compact red dot sight is mounted on the top rail, allowing for rapid target acquisition. The rifle's exterior is primarily composed of matte-finished metal and polymer, with visible screws and rails for accessory attachments. Its overall appearance suggests a weapon optimized for maneuverability and versatility in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A modern, camouflage-patterned tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine. Its angular frame and matte finish suggest urban combat readiness.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, red dot sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the camouflage pattern, skeletonized stock, suppressor, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open structure of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clearer visibility of the magazine and stock details.
